Buy Event
EntrySenderAmount

Event rules:

All qualifying buys during the event period will receive 1 entry into the raffle drawing for 300,000 ShadowGold tokens.

Five (5) winners will be drawn and distributed based on the distribution chart below.

Any drawn winner who has any sell transaction during the event period will be ineligible for a prize.

Starts: May 19 11:00PM UTC
Ends: May 20 12:00AM UTC

Minimum Qualifying Buy: 5,000 SDG

Utilizing Chainlink's provably fair and verifiable VRF random number generation system, we will draw 5 winning entries, who will be rewarded the following:

Prizes:

🥇 1st Prize: 100,000 SDG
🥈 2nd Prize: 75,000 SDG
🥉 3rd Prize: 50,000 SDG
 ④ 4th Prize: 40,000 SDG
 ⑤ 5th Prize: 35,000 SDG
